channel.title: Regions on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Regions on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Global PTU Reservations Are Now Region-Agnostic
item.description:
Global Provisioned Throughput (PTU) reservations are now region-agnostic, so one reservation can cover Global PTU deployments across multiple regions. This change is intended to improve reservation utilization and savings.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Database for MySQL now available in new regions and expanded availability zones
item.description:
Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server is now generally available in new regions and with expanded availability zone support. The update adds deployment options in Denmark East and Austria East, with the content truncated before listing the full set of regions.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL Server on Azure VMs in Malaysia West, Indonesia Central
item.description:
SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines is now generally available in the Malaysia West and Indonesia Central Azure regions. This expands deployment options for SQL Server workloads closer to users and supports data residency needs.

  • Source: Azure Updates
